nasb.text: This is a lamentation and they shall chant it. The daughters of the nations shall chant it. Over Egypt and over all her hordes they shall chant it,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: This is a lamentation that shall be chanted; the daughters of the nations shall chant it; over Egypt, and over all her multitude, shall they chant it, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 這就是人為埃及所唱的哀歌，列國的女子必唱這哀歌；她們必為埃及和它的眾民唱這哀歌。這是主耶和華的宣告。’”

ccb.text: “‘这是列国为埃及唱的哀歌，各国的妇女要为埃及和她的人民唱这哀歌。这是主耶和华说的。’”
